risk_addressed: main experiment stack may not be rerunnable from released scripts
core_action: build a self-contained rerun path for manuscript-facing outputs
pass_condition: clean local run regenerates the manuscript-facing summaries and figure source-data tables
stop_condition: record exact missing input if full rerun is blocked

risk_addressed: final multi-region polygon/equal-area package is incomplete
core_action: convert current region-level synthesis into a final cell/polygon audit package
pass_condition: each benchmark region has explicit weighting and claim status
stop_condition: label unavailable regions as proxy_only rather than imputing

core_action: attempt one pre-declared all-region cell-level hierarchical fit
pass_condition: fit runs with positive effect direction or no-fit boundary is documented
stop_condition: do not tune model families after seeing results

core_action: run token-available EGMS closure or freeze no-token protocol branch
pass_condition: EGMS claim enters manuscript only after local files are present and checksummed
stop_condition: no EGMS-derived claim without data files

risk_addressed: risk-underestimation evidence is not consolidated across all regions
core_action: build one exposure-underestimation table with claim-role labels
pass_condition: table supports exposure-accounting change without causal damage-risk language

risk_addressed: signal may be challenged as land-cover or product artifact
pass_condition: richest defensible stack keeps reference OR above 1 or claim is narrowed
stop_condition: do not add sparse controls that imply false completeness

risk_addressed: transfer probes may be mistaken for independent truth
pass_condition: transfer supports product-lineage extension without claiming independent validation
stop_condition: keep weak probes as narrative support only

risk_addressed: companion vulnerability layer may distract from the measurement-bias claim
core_action: keep GVI/SHDI/GRDI as companion evidence unless reproducibly matched
pass_condition: main claim stays focused on observability and exposure accounting
stop_condition: no raster-level socioeconomic claim without staged input

risk_addressed: public DOI and repository URL are absent
core_action: mint or confirm DOI and run post-mint validation
primary_outputs: updated Data Availability; updated Code Availability; refreshed checksums
pass_condition: manuscript no longer contains DOI or repository placeholders
stop_condition: do not publish placeholder DOI or URL values
